### What is changed and how it works?

planner: fix an unstable explain test case

symptoms: planner: fix an unstable explain test case
failure_signature: planner: fix an unstable explain test case
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: planner: fix an unstable explain test case.
fix_pattern: planner: fix an unstable explain test case

evidence: evidence: planner: fix an unstable explain test case
